body.title: T-interoception: ResourceMonitorSource as continuous milieu contributor
body.result: InteroceptionSource fully implemented as continuous milieu contributor. Added milieu.nudge_vad() for direct VAD delta application. Rewrote InteroceptionSource with: graduated CPU mapping (ease/capable/strain/overload), positive registration for calm states, db-latency/inference-latency/cluster-reachability signals, temporal accumulation via _sustained_arousal_boost(). Fixed missing import os (BoredomSource regression). 16 new tests, 126 total pass.
body.description: ResourceMonitorSource feeds resource state continuously into milieu. #336
